title: Xtra Rich Russian Beef Stew
description: A rich and chewy one-pot Russian dish featuring tomatoes, cooked to perfection using the sous-vide method and wrapped in pandan leaves for added flavor, this stew is gluten-free friendly and perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef short ribs with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and brown the beef short ribs on all sides.
Add the chopped onions to the skillet and cook until they are translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Add the crushed tomatoes, beef broth, and browned beef short ribs to the skillet and stir to combine.
Wrap the mixture in the pandan leaves, making sure to seal the edges tightly.
Place the wrapped stew in the sous-vide machine and cook for 24 hours.
Remove the stew from the sous-vide machine and let it cool to room temperature.
